translations.meta.title: IDEM - The Open Source African AI that creates companies | AI-powered business creation tool
translations.meta.description: The Open Source African AI that creates companies. IDEM is an AI-powered business creation tool: transform your idea into a complete business with strategy, brand, product, website and deploy it on servers in Africa. Designed for Africa.
translations.meta.keywords: AI business creation, African startup, business creation tool, African AI business, AI entrepreneurship assistant, African sovereign platform, specialized AI agents, AI business plan, AI logo creation, AI application development, Cameroon tech, pan-African innovation, digital sovereignty, tech entrepreneurship Africa, African startup tools, African servers, African hosting, open source
translations.og.title: IDEM - The Open Source African AI that creates companies | AI-powered business creation tool
translations.og.description: Create your business with Open Source AI. Transform your idea into a complete business: business strategy, brand identity, product, website, and deploy it on servers in Africa. Designed for Africa.
translations.twitter.title: IDEM - The Open Source African AI that creates companies
